title: Jurinea pinnata
taxonomy: Jurinea pinnata is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the sunflower or daisy family. It belongs to the genus Jurinea, which consists of various species of plants. The genus Jurinea is further classified in the tribe Cardueae, a large group of plants within the Asteraceae family. Within the tribe Cardueae, Jurinea pinnata is placed alongside other closely related species. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and genetic makeup.
uses: Jurinea pinnata is a plant species that has been traditionally used in medicine. It has been reported to have potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
